query:
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.totalSales, s.totalPoints,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'approved') as aprovadas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'pending') as pendentes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'rejected') as rejeitadas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id) as total_registros
FROM sellers s WHERE s.active = true AND s.department = 'vendas' ORDER BY s.name

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'pending') as pendentes,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id AND status = 'rejected') as rejeitadas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = s.id) as total_registros
FROM sellers s WHERE s.active = true AND s.department = 'vendas' ORDER BY s.name
